product_overview: A lightweight Flutter-based whiteboard for EduHub that lets users draw freehand annotations on a canvas and customize pen tools (color, width, type) in real time. Accessible from the main app route for quick teaching and note-taking during sessions.
core_goals: Create freehand drawings and annotations on a shared canvas
Quickly switch between pen tools and draw continuous strokes
Customize pen color, stroke width, and pen type to match markup needs
Use simple gestures (drag, double-tap) to operate tools without leaving the canvas

features.name: Whiteboard Drawing
features.description: Draw freehand strokes on the canvas using selectable pen tools and simple gestures; strokes render immediately and can be drawn in sequence.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a pen tool from the toolbar -> Drag on the canvas to draw a stroke -> See the stroke appear on the canvas
Navigate to / -> Select a pen tool from the toolbar -> Drag on the canvas to draw a stroke -> Lift input -> Drag again to draw an additional stroke -> See multiple strokes rendered in sequence
Navigate to / -> Double-tap a pen tool to change color/width -> Select color and width settings -> Drag on the canvas to draw a stroke -> See the stroke rendered with the updated color and width

features.name: Tool Customization
features.description: Open a pen picker to choose pen color, adjust stroke width, and change pen type so subsequent strokes use the updated settings.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open pen picker dialog -> Select a color from the palette -> Adjust stroke width slider -> Choose a different pen type -> Close the dialog -> Observe that the toolbar reflects the selected pen settings
Navigate to / -> Open pen picker dialog -> Adjust stroke width slider -> Close dialog without changing color -> Observe that stroke width updates while color remains the same

features.name: Whiteboard Drawing
features.description: Draw on the canvas using various pen tools
user_interactions: Select a pen tool from the toolbar
Drag on the canvas to draw a stroke
Double-tap a pen tool to change color/width

features.name: Tool Customization
features.description: Change pen settings like color, width, and type
user_interactions: Select a color from the palette

known_limitations.issue: Lasso selection might intercept drawing events if not configured correctly
known_limitations.impact: Users might accidentally select instead of draw
